titleStmt.title: SII 17.628: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 628. (A.R. No. 582 of 1904.) KAḶḶA-PERUMBŪR, TANJORE TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the central shrine in the Kailāsanātha temple.
This record commences with the praśasti Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc., of Kulōttuṅga

It records the grant of land as maḍappuṟam for feeding the devotees of the god by••••Tillaiyār Kulā Araṉ Teṟpiḍāraṉ Iraṇḍāirappichchan, a tapasi resident in the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam of god Mahādēva at Śrī Kayillāsam (Kailāsam) alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Īśvaram in Rājasundari-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nila(va)makaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara
ṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara vikkalaṉ ciṅkaṇa
r melkaṭalpāya tikkaṉaittum tan cakkara naṭātti virasiṅṅāsanat
tu Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna
Uṭaiyār tripuvaṉa(va)cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 4 10 9vatu rājacuntaric caruppetimaṅkalattu (śa) śrīkayillā(r)[sa]
māna śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa Īśvaram Uṭaiya mahādevar tirumaṭaiviḷākattil Irukkum tapasi va �ṉ tillaiyār kulā Araṉ teṟpiṭāraṉāna Iraṇ
ṭāirappiccaneṉ tevar Aṭiyār Amutuceykaikku nān maṭappuṟamāka nāṉ nirvararttu kuṭutta nilamāvatu maturāṉtakavatikku kiḻakku Irājanārāya
ṇa vāykkālukku vaṭakku Aiñcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Orumāvarai nikki Itaṉ meṟku nān kāramviceṭṭu
ṉ pakkalkoṇṭu Uṭaiyena kaya Eṉṉutāy Irunta nilam Oru māvarai Iṉilam Oru māvarai(y)yum Idevar koyiliIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.628 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
